nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to deep understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I would use AI when it would solve a problem quicker than a traditional approach

nodes.grounding_span: I used AI models to look for: mistakes, synonyms, incorrect grammar, better explanations

nodes.label: Deep engagement with ideas through struggle
nodes.grounding_span: I need to interact with researched ideas and play with them

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool requiring human involvement in writing
nodes.grounding_span: I would like AI to take the ideas from my brain and write my entire report for me

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: solve a problem quicker than a traditional approach

nodes.label: Effective professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: sound professional while getting my intended point across

nodes.label: Deep understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I need to interact with researched ideas and play with them in order for me to be able to create links between big ideas

nodes.label: Ownership and comprehension of code
nodes.grounding_span: I needed to know my own code like the back of my hand

nodes.label: Effortless completion of disliked tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't even want to be a part of it

nodes.label: Positive toward AI for quick problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: AI helped massively with getting me back into the coding mindset

nodes.label: Negative toward AI for tasks requiring deep understanding
nodes.grounding_span: Getting an AI to write this code would not be useful for me, as I would not understand it as well

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I would never ask AI to write emails for me

nodes.label: Interactive learning through manipulation and struggle
nodes.grounding_span: I need to interact with researched ideas and play with them

nodes.label: Methodical verification through testing and line-by-line review
nodes.grounding_span: I go through the new code, line-by-line, to check if it is logical
